title: Write ferrum_extlib_pki.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_pki: key generation, CSR creation, certificate signing, PKCS#12. Ferrum stdlib has Ed25519 key generation but not PKI infrastructure. Design extlib module: key generation defaults (Ed25519/X25519 primary, P-256/P-384 interop, RSA-2048/3072 legacy-only), CSR construction, self-signed certs for DANE usage 3, PKCS#12 import/export.
